description: Docker infrastructure - Production Dockerfiles for all deployable apps/services plus a comprehensive docker-compose.yml for full-stack development
steps: 1. Create `docker/.dockerignore` at project root - Ignore node_modules, .git, .next, dist, .turbo, *.md, .env*, coverage, e2e, tests, __tests__.
2. Create `.dockerignore` at project root (symlink or copy of docker/.dockerignore) for docker-compose context.

3. Create `docker/base.Dockerfile` - Multi-stage base: Stage 1 (deps): FROM node:22-slim, enable corepack, pnpm@10.28.1, copy workspace manifests + pnpm-lock.yaml, pnpm install --frozen-lockfile. Stage 2 (build): copy source, turbo build. Stage 3 (runner): node:22-slim, non-root user (nodejs:1001), copy only production artifacts. This is a reference/template, individual apps use their own.

4. Create `apps/quantmail/Dockerfile` - Multi-stage: install deps with turbo prune for @quant/quantmail, build with next build, run with next start. Expose port 3010. Non-root user. HEALTHCHECK curl localhost:3010/api/health.
5. Create `apps/quantchat/Dockerfile` - Same pattern as quantmail. Expose port 3015. HEALTHCHECK on /api/health.
6. Create `apps/quantai/Dockerfile` - Same pattern. Expose port 3020 (backend) and 3000 (Next.js). HEALTHCHECK on /healthz.
7. Create `apps/admin/Dockerfile` - Same pattern. Expose port 3100. HEALTHCHECK on /api/health.
8. Verify existing `services/ws-gateway/Dockerfile` is correct (it exists and looks good). No changes needed.

9. Create `docker-compose.yml` at project root - Full production-like compose with: postgres (pgvector), redis, all 4 app containers (quantmail, quantchat, quantai, admin), ws-gateway service. Proper networking (quant-network bridge), health checks, environment variables, depends_on with condition: service_healthy, volume mounts for dev. Redis used for EventBus scaling.
10. Update `.github/workflows/ci.yml` - Add quantmail, quantchat, quantai, admin to the docker-build matrix so CI validates all Dockerfiles build successfully.
acceptance_criteria: Each Dockerfile (quantmail, quantchat, quantai, admin) has multi-stage build with deps/build/runner stages
All Dockerfiles use node:22-slim base, non-root user, HEALTHCHECK instruction
docker-compose.yml defines all services with proper networking and health checks
CI workflow matrix includes all deployable services
pnpm turbo typecheck still passes (no code changes, only Docker/YAML files)
findings: All verification passed. Typecheck (133 tasks), lint (112 tasks) all pass. Docker build validated through deps stage for quantai Dockerfile - installs all dependencies successfully. YAML files validated with Python yaml parser. Pre-commit hooks (prettier) ran successfully on commit. The .dockerignore was updated from minimal to comprehensive. quantmail Dockerfile was replaced (previously had a different TS compilation approach). CI matrix now includes 5 services total (ws-gateway + 4 apps) with dynamic dockerfile path resolution.
